name: Mophead Dash
author: Poki
description: Join Mophead on an Epic Dash Adventure! Take control of Mophead - a speedy ball with wild, mop-like hair, as he zooms through colorful levels collecting delicious sushi! Glide, dash, and fly through vibrant worlds filled with fun obstacles and hidden surprises. Quick reflexes and sharp moves will help you race through each level, unlock cool power-ups, and avoid tricky traps. Perfect for everyone who loves fast-paced action, Mophead Dash is all about fun, speed, and excitement! Can you guide Mophead to become the ultimate sushi master? How do I play Mophead Dash? You can move using WASD, the arrow keys, or by clicking and swiping with the mouse! Who created Mophead Dash? Mophead Dash is created by Gametornado. Play their other games on Poki: Bow Mania , Bullet Bros , Death Chase , Dreadhead Parkour , Eugene's Life , Flip Bros , Jelly Cat , Lucky Life , Mini Train , Parkour Jump , Poor Eddie , Rio Rex , Sharkosaurus Rampage , Short Life , Short Life 2 , and Short Ride ! How can I play Mophead Dash for free? You can play Mophead Dash for free on Poki. Can I play Mophead Dash on mobile devices and desktop? Mophead Dash can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
